United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: NHL Now
programme.desc: A front row seat to the news and happenings from around the league, as hosts E.J. Hradek and Jackie Redmond, along with NHL Insiders, set up for a night of NHL game action.

programme.title: Live: NHL Tonight
programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: Catch in-game action, plus news from around the NHL, previews of all the games throughout the league, and real-time score updates. This is your one-stop to catch every game, every night.

programme.desc: Whip around through live look-ins, real-time scores, breaking news and expert analysis with the studio hosts and seasoned NHL veterans. Stay on top of all the action around the league with NHL Tonight.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from Valley Village, Calif., Los Angeles and Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Friends Alexis and Camille battle brothers Jeremy and Nathan.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Nancy, Rhonda, Rob, and Emily compete.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles, featuring George Stephanopoulos, Ali Wentworth, Bethenny Frankel and Ana Gasteyer.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants from Boston and Los Angeles play for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A woman from California returns to finish her game; a man from New York plays for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Master Minds
programme.desc: Three challengers take on some of the great minds in trivia in a showdown of smarts and strategy; the last contestant standing will face off against the highest scoring Master Mind in a head-to-head battle.

programme.title: The Perfect Line
programme.desc: Sara, Cricket, Joi, and Anita.

programme.title: Flip Side
programme.desc: Married couple Aman and Amit battle co-workers Macall and Corinne.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria "The Queen" Groce holds court as the featured Chaser and goes toe-to-toe with a drama teacher, a substitute teacher and a tour guide.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Tamara, a professor, and her husband Leo, a mental health therapist, from Jonesboro, Ark., take on the wall and the all-new Free Fall+ for a chance at over $12 million.

programme.title: Press Your Luck
programme.desc: Contestants from El Segundo, San Diego and Bakersfield, Calif.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Baker Chris and his partner Justin duel friends Jen and Rachel.

programme.desc: Besties Ann and Robin go up against newlyweds DJ and Allison.

programme.title: Chain Reaction

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Brad "The Buzzsaw" Rutter returns to face off with a writer from Los Angeles, a university student and a recovering attorney from Hawaii.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Cousins Travis and Michael face the wall; they are construction workers from Willow Wood, Ohio, and love to lend a helping hand to those in need; these cousins attempt to walk away with a massive payout.

programme.desc: Get the latest on the Chicago Bears with Ruthie Polinsky and Clay Harbor, featuring game previews, reactions, analysis and exclusive interviews.

programme.desc: The show keeps it pretty simple, emphasizing the fun personalities and stories behind the players, injecting lifestyle and reality aspects to the game.

programme.title: Kash & Matty Talkin' Golf
programme.desc: Award winning golf journalist Steve Kashul, and Chicago area golf guru Matt Smith talk golf covering top Chicago area, Midwest, and national golf topics. Discussions include golf courses, equipment, apparel, and include interviews with golf personalities, tour pros, top swing instructors, and celebrities.

programme.desc: A look at the Bears, the Bears' NFC North division rivals, and the NFL at large with insightful, analytical, and entertaining content every day.

programme.title: PGA Championship Highlights
programme.desc: Tiger Woods returns to rare form with a five stroke victory over Shaun Micheel at the 88th PGA Championship at Medinah Country Club. The win marks Woods' 3rd PGA Championship and the 12th major of his career.

programme.title: Jeopardy!
programme.desc: The Emmy-winning quiz show features a unique answer-and-question format.

programme.title: Family Feud
programme.desc: Family Feud is an American television game show where two families compete to name the responses to survey questions in order to win cash and prizes.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Paid Programming
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mercy Ships
programme.desc: Mercy Ship's crew of world class medical volunteers sail across the globe providing lifesaving surgeries to those with nowhere else to turn.

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn what's behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQ's Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Gene Rayburn hosts this comedy-game show hybrid in which contestants try to match answers given by celebrities to humorous, and often risque, fill-in-the-blank questions. The contestant with the most points at the end of the game advances to play the bonus round, in which the contestant has a chance to win thousands of dollars, with the actual amount dependent on the rules in place at the time of

programme.title: Match Game
programme.desc: Joe Flynn, Linda Kaye Henning, Betty White, Richard Dawson, Charles Nelson Reilly, Brett Somers Two contestants try to match six celebrities in a game of fill.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: Two teams of three compete to complete a chain of words after the first and last words in the chain are revealed.

programme.title: Catch 21
programme.desc: Aces For Everyone; players add cards by answering pop trivia questions and try to build the closest hand to 21 without busting in this fast-action game of knowledge and strategy.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unsuspecting taxi cab passengers answer trivia questions posed by host Ben Bailey; the passengers may reach their destination with cold hard cash or walk away empty-handed.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.title: The $100,000 Pyramid
programme.desc: Celebrity battles, featuring George Stephanopoulos, Ali Wentworth, Bethenny Frankel and Ana Gasteyer.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Contestants from Boston and Los Angeles play for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: A woman from California returns to finish her game; a man from New York plays for the top prize of $1 million.

programme.desc: In a classic game-show version of "Hangman," contestants solve word puzzles for cash and prizes.

programme.desc: Sara, Cricket, Joi, and Anita.

programme.desc: Married couple Aman and Amit battle co-workers Macall and Corinne.

programme.title: Chain Reaction
programme.desc: "Chain Reaction" is back with fan-favorite Dylan Lane returning as host of the popular word puzzle game in which players compete to form chains composed of two-word phrases.

programme.title: America Says
programme.desc: John Michael Higgins hosts as two teams of friends race against a clock to guess how America filled in the blanks on a series of survey questions covering every topic under the sun.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Victoria "The Queen" Groce holds court as the featured Chaser and goes toe-to-toe with a drama teacher, a substitute teacher and a tour guide.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Tamara, a professor, and her husband Leo, a mental health therapist, from Jonesboro, Ark., take on the wall and the all-new Free Fall+ for a chance at over $12 million.

programme.desc: Contestants from El Segundo, San Diego and Bakersfield, Calif.

programme.title: The Wall
programme.desc: Cousins Travis and Michael face the wall; they are construction workers from Willow Wood, Ohio, and love to lend a helping hand to those in need; these cousins attempt to walk away with a massive payout.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.desc: From Fenway Park in Boston.

programme.title: Boston Has Entered the Chat
programme.desc: A daily show featuring conversational debate that sets up the day in Boston sports. The format incorporates social media and timely guests to inform and entertain fans of New England sports teams.

programme.title: Liverpool Football
programme.desc: An encore presentation of Liverpool's on-field action from the past week plus behind-the-scenes team access and social media clips.

programme.title: LFC Trending
programme.desc: A showcase of the most popular videos and social media highlights from across Liverpool Football Club, its players and its supporters.

programme.title: The Varsity With John Ourand
programme.desc: John Ourand and a rotating cast of industry insiders take you inside the executive suites and owners boxes where the decisions that shape the entire sports business are made; you'll hear interviews with players, execs and everyone in between.

programme.title: World Class Championship Boxing
programme.desc: In the main event, IBF, WBA, and WBC Middleweight Champion Claressa Shields, widely considered the best female boxer in the world, takes on fellow undefeated WBO World Champion Savannah Marshall with all the titles on the line.

programme.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
programme.desc: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Premier League Rewind
programme.desc: Mohamed Salah sets a new Premier League goalscoring record as the Reds look to secure fourth place on the final day of the 2017/18 domestic season.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: The best of the action from May 2021 as Liverpool take on Manchester United.

programme.title: Flags and Banners: The Art of LFC
programme.desc: An exclusive documentary which delves into the history and culture of the club's flags and banners.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Luis Diaz.

programme.title: Premier League Heroes
programme.desc: How a 17-year-old burst onto the scene and grew to become one of the finest goalscorers to have pulled on the famous red jersey.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A look back at some of Georginio Wijnaldum's greatest goals.

programme.title: The Premier League Review Show
programme.desc: Join Neil Mellor as he analyses the action and looks back on the stats from Liverpool's game against Chelsea.

programme.title: Better Than Brazil
programme.desc: An LFC Originals mini-documentary that relives the famous night in April 1988 when Liverpool put five past Nottingham Forest.

programme.title: 130 Greatest LFC Goals
programme.desc: The complete countdown of Liverpool's most memorable goals; be it in terms of importance, iconic status or simply sheer quality - with the top 10 voted for by the fans.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far
programme.desc: All the goals from Liverpool's Premier League season so far.

programme.title: Cup Classics
programme.desc: Regarded as one of the greatest FA Cup finals in modern history, relive the action from 2006 as Liverpool and West Ham play out a thrilling encounter at the Millennium Stadium.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Virgil Van Dijk.

programme.title: Retro Review Show
programme.desc: Phil Thompson joins Neil Mellor to analyse the action and talk through the stats from the 1974 FA Cup win win over Newcastle United.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A look back at some of Darwin Núñez greatest goals.

programme.title: Goal of the Month
programme.desc: We count down the best goals scored in April.

programme.title: Premier League Rewind
programme.desc: Mohamed Salah sets a new Premier League goalscoring record as the Reds look to secure fourth place on the final day of the 2017/18 domestic season.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: The best of the action from May 2021 as Liverpool take on Manchester United.

programme.title: Goal Rush
programme.desc: A collection of the best Liverpool goals scored by Cody Gakpo.

programme.title: Goal Rush: Premier League Season So Far

programme.title: Cup Classics
programme.desc: Regarded as one of the greatest FA Cup finals in modern history, relive the action from 2006 as Liverpool and West Ham play out a thrilling encounter at the Millennium Stadium.

programme.title: Liverpool's Sound
programme.desc: Kop Chants and their Origins - We explore the history of Liverpool's unique and unrivalled songbook in an exclusive documentary.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Goal of the Month
programme.desc: We count down the best goals scored in April.

programme.title: Shankly's Second Coming
programme.desc: An LFC Originals documentary that charts the rise of Bill Shanklys second great team and how it came to fruition with an unprecedented double in 1972/73.

programme.title: The Premier League Review Show
programme.desc: Join Neil Mellor as he analyses the action and looks back on the stats from Liverpool's game against Chelsea.

programme.title: Press Box
programme.desc: Members of the local press pack discuss all things LFC and debate some of the current wider issues in football.

programme.title: Liverpool U18
programme.desc: The best of the action as Liverpool U18 take on Derby County.

programme.title: Premier League Rewind
programme.desc: Relive some memorable Premier League action against the Villans as we replay the highlights of games from 1996, 1998, 2009 and 2016.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: Jayden Maiava threw for 265 yards and two touchdowns to help the Trojans beat the 15th-ranked Wolverines, 31-13. From Oct. 11, 2025.

programme.title: USC Football Classic
programme.desc: King Miller rushed for 124 yards and two touchdowns to help lead the 17th-ranked Trojans to a 29-10 win over the Bruins. From Nov. 29, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: College Golf
programme.desc: Coverage of college golf action.

programme.title: College Football
programme.desc: From Husky Stadium in Seattle, Wash.

programme.title: B1G Football in 60
programme.desc: Demond Williams Jr. passed for two touchdowns and ran in two more scores for the Huskies in their victory over the Bruins. From Nov. 22, 2025.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Hear from head coach Sasho Cirovski, Sebastian Elney, Chase Gasper and more as they re-live Elney's game-winning goals that secured Maryland wins over rival UCLA in 2015 and 2017.

programme.title: Women's College Lacrosse
programme.desc: Finals.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.title: College Softball
programme.desc: From Maryland Softball Stadium in College Park, Md.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Get to know cousins and Ohio State baseball players, Henry Kaczmar and Mason Eckelman. Learn about the legacy of Iowa baseball dads and sons. Purdue's Anna Moore discusses the loss of her dad and her relationship with softball. Hear about Illinois Softball's mentality of Taking Care of Blue.

programme.title: The B1G Moment
programme.desc: Caitlin Clark, Payton Sandfort and more take a look back on Iowa basketball's dramatic wins over Indiana and Michigan State during one weekend in February 2023 at Carver-Hawkeye Arena.

programme.title: Live: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The Game: 2006.....Remembered
programme.desc: The history of events leading up to the much-anticipated matchup between the top-ranked Buckeyes and the second-ranked Wolverines in what is now called the Game of the Century.

programme.title: Ohio State Football Classic
programme.desc: From Nov. 18, 2006.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: Oregon Football Classic
programme.desc: Dante Moore threw for 286 yards and a touchdown in the 6th-ranked Ducks' 26-14 victory over the Huskies. From Nov. 29, 2025.

programme.title: B1G Today
programme.desc: News from around the Big 10 Conference.

programme.title: The Journey: Big Ten Football
programme.desc: See why Fernando Mendoza chose Indiana to further develop his skills as a quarterback. Learn why Aiden Fisher wears the number four and Elijah Sarratt's journey to becoming a top receiver. Plus, highlights from the Hoosiers' 2025 season.

programme.title: Indiana Football Classic
programme.desc: Fernando Mendoza passed for 222 yards and a touchdown in the 2nd-ranked Hoosiers' 13-10 victory over the top-ranked Buckeyes to claim Indiana's first Big Ten Championship since 1967. From Dec. 6, 2025.

programme.title: At The Plate
programme.desc: Learn about Ava Carroll's journey to Washington. See how head coach Jake Boss Jr.'s father has continued to support him and the Michigan State baseball program. Get to know Wisconsin's Hilary and Addison Blomberg.

programme.desc: See how Roch Cholowsky is chasing a storybook ending to his collegiate career with UCLA. Get to know Michigan baseball's Elie Kligman. Learn how Maryland's Aubrey Wurst is pursuing a future in broadcast journalism.

programme.desc: Jai Patel kicked the game-winning field goal as time expired to lift the Scarlet Knights to a 27-24 victory over the Boilermakers. From Oct. 25, 2025.

programme.title: UCLA Football Classic
programme.desc: Nico Iamaleava passed for two touchdowns and ran in 3 more scores to lead the Bruins to a 42-37 upset victory over the 7th-ranked Nittany Lions. From Oct. 4, 2025.

programme.desc: Mateen Bhaghani kicked a 23-yard field goal with two seconds remaining to lift the Bruins to a 20-17 victory over the Terrapins. From Oct. 18, 2025.
